ἐξεταστικῶς adv. (s. ἐξετάζω; Demosth. 17, 13) with probing inquiry PEg2 43–44 (as restored by the ed. ἐξ̣[ετας]τικῶς).

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Demosth Demosth , IV b.c.—List 5

  1. ed. = edited (by), edition
